title: bupleurum citrinum
intro: Bupleurum citrinum, also known as Chinese thorowax or Bupleurum root, is a plant species in the Apiaceae family, native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum citrinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support liver health, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. Bupleurum citrinum can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as dried root, extract, or tea, which can be used to support overall well-being and prevent illness.
